title: Erode farmer associations to meet Vijay; turmeric MSP top of agenda
summary: Erode-based farmer associations confirmed they will meet TVK chief Vijay on May 8-9 and will press for a statutory minimum support price for turmeric in any new agriculture budget.

title: DMK Erode district unit holds emergency MLA meeting amid alliance buzz
summary: The DMK Erode district unit held an emergency meeting of its MLAs on May 8 amid swirling speculation around a tactical understanding with AIADMK to keep TVK out of office.

title: Erode turmeric mandi sees 8% price drop in a week
summary: Wholesale turmeric prices at the Erode mandi have slipped about 8 percent in the past week, with traders blaming weak export demand and political uncertainty in the state.

title: Chithode toll plaza to enforce new FASTag norms from May 9
summary: The Chithode toll plaza on NH-544 will start full enforcement of the revised FASTag norms from midnight on May 9, with double-toll penalties for non-compliant vehicles.

title: Erode women collectives demand ₹1,000 scheme be made statutory
summary: Women's collectives in Erode have demanded that the Magalir Urimai Thogai cash transfer be backed by legislation so that any future government cannot easily roll it back.
